---
title: "Dissertation Timeline"
date: "Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    self_contained: true
    toc: false
    css: docs/css/styles.css
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
    rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding,
                      output_file = "docs/calendar.html") })
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r define-events}
zoom_link <- "https://umass-amherst.zoom.us/j/97299985791"

# ===== EDIT MILESTONES HERE =====
milestones <- data.frame(
  date = as.Date(c(
    "2026-03-31",
    "2026-04-07",
    "2026-04-09",
    "2026-04-14",
    "2026-04-21",
    "2026-04-28",
    "2026-04-28",
    "2026-05-05",
    "2026-05-24"
  )),
  text = c(
    "Timeline review with Brian",
    "&Aacute;lvaro delivers complete proposal presentation to Brian",
    "Send proposed dates to committee for proposal defence",
    "&Aacute;lvaro sends chapter 1 to Brian",
    "&Aacute;lvaro sends chapter 2 to Brian",
    "&Aacute;lvaro sends chapter 3 to Brian",
    "Send full proposal to committee",
    "Dissertation proposal defence",
    "Testing how this works"
  ),
  type = "milestone",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
# ================================

# ===== ADD EXTRA ONE-OFF EVENTS HERE =====
# Each row is one event. Add as many as you like.
# Example:
#   date = as.Date("2026-04-15"), text = "Some event", type = "other"
extra_events <- data.frame(
  date = as.Date(c(
    "2026-04-15",
    "2026-03-20"
  )),
  text = c(
    "&Aacute;lvaro sends tentative dates",
    'Meeting with Brian, 14:00&ndash;15:00 ET (<a href="%s">Zoom</a>)'
  ),
  type = c(
    "other",
    "meeting"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
# ==========================================

cal_start <- as.Date("2026-03-16")  # first Monday shown
cal_end   <- as.Date("2026-05-31")  # last Sunday shown

# Time-aware current moment (ET)
now_et    <- as.POSIXct(Sys.time(), tz = "America/New_York")
today     <- as.Date(now_et)
hour_et   <- as.numeric(format(now_et, "%H")) +
             as.numeric(format(now_et, "%M")) / 60
after_mtg <- hour_et >= 15   # past 3 pm ET => today's events are done

# Tuesday meetings (auto-generated)
tuesdays <- seq.Date(from = as.Date("2026-04-07"), to = cal_end, by = "week")
meetings <- data.frame(
  date = tuesdays,
  text = sprintf(
    'Meeting with Brian, 14:00&ndash;15:00 ET (<a href="%s">Zoom</a>)',
    zoom_link
  ),
  type = "meeting",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

all_events <- rbind(
  milestones[, c("date", "text", "type")],
  meetings,
  extra_events
)

# Next upcoming milestone for countdown + highlight (meetings excluded)
upcoming_ms <- milestones[
  milestones$date > today | (milestones$date == today & !after_mtg), ]
next_evt <- if (nrow(upcoming_ms) > 0) upcoming_ms[1, ] else NULL
```

```{r countdown, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(next_evt)) {
  days_left <- as.numeric(next_evt$date - today)
  label     <- if (days_left == 0) "Today" else
               if (days_left == 1) "1 day"  else
               paste0(days_left, " days")
  cat(sprintf(
    '<div class="countdown-box"><strong>%s until:</strong> %s</div>\n\n',
    label, next_evt$text
  ))
} else {
  cat('<div class="countdown-box"><strong>All milestones complete!</strong></div>\n\n')
}
```

```{r calendar, results='asis'}
week_starts <- seq.Date(from = cal_start, to = cal_end - 6, by = "week")

for (ws in as.list(week_starts)) {
  ws <- as.Date(ws)
  we <- ws + 6

  is_past    <- we < today | (we == today & after_mtg)
  is_current <- (ws <= today) & (today <= we)

  week_events <- all_events[all_events$date >= ws & all_events$date <= we, ]
  if (nrow(week_events) == 0) next

  # Sort by date, then meetings first within each day
  week_events$sort_type <- ifelse(week_events$type == "meeting", 0, 1)
  week_events <- week_events[order(week_events$date, week_events$sort_type), ]

  block_class <- if (is_past)    "week-block past-week"        else
                 if (is_current) "week-block current-week-block" else
                 "week-block"

  cat(sprintf('<div class="%s">\n', block_class))
  cat(sprintf(
    '<div class="week-header">%s &ndash; %s</div>\n',
    format(ws, "%B %d"), format(we, "%B %d")
  ))

  # Group events by day
  for (d in as.list(sort(unique(week_events$date)))) {
    d          <- as.Date(d)
    day_events <- week_events[week_events$date == d, ]

    cat(sprintf(
      '<div class="day-block"><div class="day-header">%s</div>\n',
      format(d, "%A, %B %d")
    ))
    cat('<ul class="event-list">\n')

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(day_events))) {
      e <- day_events[i, ]

      is_next <- !is.null(next_evt) &&
                 e$date == next_evt$date &&
                 e$text == next_evt$text

      item_class <- if (is_next)             "next-event"    else
                    if (e$type == "meeting") "meeting-item"  else
                    "other-item"

      cat(sprintf('<li class="%s">%s</li>\n', item_class, e$text))
    }

    cat('</ul></div>\n')
  }

  cat('</div>\n\n')
}
```

---

<!-- *Days remaining updates each time you knit.* -->
